Modifications

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Adding torch compile annotations to some models
vllm.author: CRZbulabula
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR is to improve #9589, adding torch compile annotations to some models and testing them.

vllm.title: [Doc] Update multi-input support
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Update the Supported Models page w.r.t. #9095 and #8905

vllm.title: [Frontend] Chat-based Embeddings API
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR extends the existing Embeddings API to accept chat conversations similar to Chat Completions API. This enables multi-modal conversations to be passed to the embedding model.
To reduce code duplication, I've also factored out the common code for handling completion and chat-based inputs into

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Add Model Tests for PixtralHF
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds a simple vLLM vs HF test for PixtralHF models
Tested locally with
pytest tests/models/decoder_only/vision_language/test_models.py -k "pixtral" -s -v
...
============================= 8 passed, 109 deselected, 77 warnings in 657.77s (0:10:57) ==============================

vllm.title: [Frontend] Use a proper chat template for VLM2Vec
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
VLM2Vec is not intended to be a chat model, so the existing chat template from Phi-3.5-vision doesn't work well.
Building on #9759, this PR adds a chat template to convert the incoming messages into a format suitable for VLM2Vec and updates the docs accordingly.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix edge cases for MistralTokenizer
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We have encountered a couple of bugs when using --tokenizer-mode mistral with mistralai/Pixtral-12B-2409 (i.e. the V3-Tekken tokenizer) that cause the engine to crash with an error when certain tokens are generated. The exception is a KeyError when converting from strings to token ids, after convert

vllm.title: [Core] Refactor: Clean up unused argument preemption_mode in Scheduler._preempt
vllm.author: andrejonasson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Cleans up an unused argument preemption_mode in the function Scheduler._preempt and removes the usage of that unused argument. This PR does not change any existing behaviour.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] use interpreter with stable api from pytorch
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: avoid using too much internal api from pytorch

Removes the assertion to allow models with k_scale and v_scale like neuralmagic/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct-FP8-KV
fixes: #8641

vllm.title: [Core][VLM] Add precise multi-modal placeholder tracking
vllm.author: petersalas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, multi-modal prompt placeholders are related to the multi-modal embeddings exclusively by index, i.e. the first placeholder token in the prompt must correspond to the first MM embedding vector, etc. This adds a mechanism for tracking multi-modal placeholder ranges precisely which allows mu

vllm.title: [ci/build] Have dependabot ignore pinned dependencies
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Dependabot tries to upgrade everything it sees but it should ignore the pinned dependencies.

vllm.title: [Encoder Decoder] Add flash_attn kernel support for encoder-decoder models
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds support for flash attention kernel for encoder decoder models.  For encoder-decoder models with dtype=bfloat16 the default backend choice is now FlashAttention instead of XFormers. However for llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct we still use the Xformers backend even with dtype=bfloat16 becau
